summary: Free subscriber out of market game - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is a free subscriber
AND a scheduled/in-progress game is outside the users viewing market
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a scheduled/in-progress out-of-market game tile
steps.result:
THEN the following title text is displayed "[MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV] Subscription Required" (subject to change via Content Restrictions)
AND the following description text is displayed "You need an active [MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV] subscription to view this game. [MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV] Single Team subscribers, click your team’s broadcast. New Users please visit [www.mlb.com/|http://www.mlb.com/]<device_platform> to purchase." (subject to change via Content Restrictions)
AND the following title Text is displayed "Full Game Access"
AND an [Upgrade Plan] button is displayed below "Full Game Access"
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page if they select the [Upgrade Plan] button
AND the user is navigated back to the Games page after pressing the "back" button on the controller
